analytics.title: Analytics

hero.doctorTitle: Clinical signal changes in your surveillance radius
hero.subtitle: Uses outbreak start dates to detect new signals, compare them against the previous period, and prioritize what needs attention.

empty.title: No outbreak analytics are available for this radius yet.
empty.text: Try expanding the radar range or refreshing after the next outbreak CSV import.

selectionRequired.title: Select a disease to view analytics.
selectionRequired.text: Metrics, the map, and recommendations are calculated only after choosing an available disease.

disease.title: Disease
disease.text: The selector starts with the disease with the most outbreaks in the initial 75 km municipal radius; then you can choose any disease in the current range.

newOutbreaks.title: New outbreaks
newOutbreaks.text: Counts active outbreaks for the selected disease whose started_at falls inside the chosen period and radius.

previous.title: Previous period
previous.text: Counts outbreaks for the same disease in the immediately previous window of the same length.

prediction.title: Prediction
prediction.text: Projects upcoming starts using the difference between the current and previous windows; it is a planning estimate.

info.system: All diseases available in the system.

map.title: Map by selected disease
map.subtitle: Shows active hotspots for the evaluated disease inside the selected radius.

analytics.zoneTrend: {{disease}} is contributing {{cases}} in this surveillance radius. The start date is used to prioritize emerging hotspots.

ranking.title: Top 5 diseases by outbreaks
ranking.selectButton: Select a disease from the ranking

diseaseDetail.trend: {{recent}} outbreaks started in the selected period versus {{previous}} in the previous comparable period.

change.title: Signal movement since the previous period
change.periodComparison: {{recent}} outbreak signals started in the last {{days}} days versus {{previous}} in the previous comparable window.
change.topDisease: {{disease}} is the leading emerging signal with {{starts}} new starts and {{cases}} active cases.
change.noTopDisease: No dominant emerging disease was detected in this radius.
change.highRisk: {{count}} disease groups are above the high-risk threshold and should be reviewed first.
change.noHighRisk: No disease group is currently above the high-risk threshold.
change.adminAction: Operational planning should use the {{direction}} signal to tune staffing, tests, beds, and isolation readiness.
change.doctorAction: Clinical teams should use the {{direction}} signal to tune differential diagnosis and test prioritization.

diseaseSummary.text: {{disease}} has {{recent}} new outbreaks in the selected window.

summary.none: Select a disease to calculate risk.
summary.high: {{disease}} needs priority follow-up due to volume, growth, or spread.
summary.moderate: {{disease}} has a moderate signal that should be watched closely.
summary.low: {{disease}} shows a low signal with contained behavior.

factors.recentGrowth: {{current}} recent outbreaks versus {{previous}} in the previous window.
factors.noRecentGrowth: Does not exceed the previous window.
factors.containedCases: {{count}} active cases, below the high threshold.
factors.stableProjection: Prediction does not increase versus the current window.
factors.noElevating: No additional factors are raising alert.
factors.noReducing: No clear factors are reducing alert.

admin.supplies: Review supplies and staffing assumptions for {{disease}} response pathways.
admin.standard: Keep standard readiness while no dominant emerging signal is detected.
admin.reserve: Reserve escalation capacity for high-risk disease groups before the next intake cycle.
admin.monitor: Maintain normal surge monitoring; no high-risk cluster is above threshold.
admin.plan: Plan for approximately {{count}} new outbreak starts next comparable period if the current signal persists.

doctor.prioritize: Prioritize {{disease}} in differential diagnosis for compatible symptoms.
doctor.broad: Continue broad differential diagnosis; no dominant emerging disease is detected.
doctor.tests: Use recent-start outbreak signals to guide test selection and patient questioning.
doctor.baseline: No new outbreak starts were detected in the selected period; keep baseline triage.
doctor.escalate: Escalate clinical suspicion for high-risk groups when presentation and location match.
doctor.standard: Current signal does not require elevated suspicion beyond standard protocols.

hero.title: Differential diagnosis with locality-aware risk context
hero.description: Evaluate the patient, contrast symptoms with nearby outbreaks, and confirm the most reliable diagnostic path.

assistant.title: Diagnosis Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Cross-checking symptoms with nearby epidemiological activity
assistant.emptyText: Run the analysis or ask a follow-up question to query the backend assistant.
assistant.analysisPrompt: Evaluate this patient and suggest differential diagnoses, risk factors, and next diagnostic steps.
assistant.analysisPromptWithSymptoms: Evaluate this patient and suggest differential diagnoses, risk factors, and next diagnostic steps. Symptoms: {{symptoms}}

outbreakContext.noSignals: No active outbreak signals matched this case.
outbreakContext.headline: {{summary}} covering {{total}} reported cases.

localAlerts.stateOnly: The available signal is statewide; no nearby municipality breakdown is available for this alert.

finalize.title: Finalize Diagnosis
finalize.subtitle: Select a catalog disease, then confirm or override the assistant.
finalize.notesPlaceholder: Optional note about why this diagnosis was confirmed or overridden...

feedback.selectDiseaseError: Select a normalized disease from the database before finalizing.
feedback.otherDiseaseRequired: Type the other disease before finalizing.

validation.birthDateFormat: Birth date must use YYYY-MM-DD format.

errors.loadThread: Unable to load the saved assistant thread.
errors.restoreEvaluation: Unable to restore the active diagnosis evaluation.
errors.saveEvaluation: Unable to save the patient evaluation.
errors.reachAssistant: Unable to reach the diagnosis assistant.
errors.uploadFile: Unable to upload the selected file.
errors.webUploadOnly: File upload is currently available in the web app only.
errors.readFile: Unable to read the selected file.
errors.translateHistory: Some assistant responses could not be translated. Showing the original text.

dashboard.screenSummary: Operational summary of outbreaks, alerts, and hospital capacity.

hero.title: Outbreak surveillance & hospital monitoring
hero.description: Real-time monitoring of disease outbreaks, active alerts, and hospital metrics within your surveillance radius.

radiusControl.label: Analysis range
radiusControl.contextDescription: Adjust the radius used to recalculate the dashboard.

map.title: Live Heatmap
map.selectStateHint: Select a state to inspect municipal outbreaks

alerts.title: Most Relevant Active Outbreaks
alerts.emptyDescription: No active outbreak signals are currently available for this hospital context.

diseaseBreakdown.title: Disease Breakdown
diseaseBreakdown.localTitle: Outbreaks in the municipality and surroundings

reports.bothOptionDescription: Includes both contexts in one PDF.
reports.previewSubtitle: Review {{count}} outbreaks before accepting the download.
reports.previewUnavailable: Document preview is not available in this environment.

overlays.reportSubtitle: Regional burden and clinical trend overview for the active diseases currently tracked.
overlays.topSignalText: The leading disease in the active context remains the strongest signal for clinical triage.
overlays.areaWatchText: Nearby outbreak zones should stay under active observation this cycle.
overlays.clinicalRecommendationText: Sustain triage readiness and keep compatible high-risk presentations under rapid escalation review.

active-cases-nearby.title: Active Cases Nearby
active-cases-nearby.subtitle: Active outbreak cases in hospital context
active-cases-nearby.detailSummary: Sum of active municipal outbreaks in the hospital radius plus active state-level outbreaks for the hospital state.
active-cases-nearby.insightCriteria: Nearby outbreaks ranked by severity, then case count.
active-cases-nearby.recommendedAction: Keep triage aligned with diseases currently active near the hospital.

highest-case-disease.title: Highest Case Disease
highest-case-disease.subtitle: Largest active case count in current context
highest-case-disease.detailSummary: This replaces projected growth until weekly historical series are available.
highest-case-disease.insightCriteria: Locations with the most cases of the dominant disease.
highest-case-disease.recommendedAction: Use this signal as epidemiological context, not as a standalone diagnosis.

local-risk-level.title: Local Risk Level
local-risk-level.subtitle: Based on active outbreak count and total cases
local-risk-level.detailSummary: Risk is derived from active outbreak volume in the hospital geographic context.
local-risk-level.insightCriteria: Active outbreaks closest to the hospital.
local-risk-level.recommendedAction: Review nearby outbreaks before evaluating compatible symptoms.

priority-municipality.title: Priority Municipality
priority-municipality.subtitle: Highest concentration of priority outbreaks
priority-municipality.detailSummary: Groups high and moderate severity municipal outbreaks inside the selected radius.
priority-municipality.insightCriteria: Priority outbreaks in the municipality ranked by severity and cases.
priority-municipality.recommendedAction: Prioritize this municipality when reviewing compatible symptoms and nearby outbreak context.

kpiDetails.defaultCriteria: Operational signals related to this KPI.
kpiDetails.icuCriteria: Critical-care availability signals without repeating the headline ICU count.
kpiDetails.outbreaksCriteria: Nearby active outbreaks ranked by case burden.

titles.activateIcuSurgeProtocol: ICU Capacity Critical - Activate Surge Protocol
titles.replenishCriticalRespiratorySupplies: Replenish Critical Protective and Respiratory Supplies

descriptions.expandMonitoredBedCapacity: Open additional monitored beds to prevent hospital capacity overflow.
descriptions.monitorBedOccupancyTrend: Start contingency planning to avoid reaching critical capacity.
descriptions.increaseEmergencyPhysicianStaffing: Increase emergency physician coverage due to nearby outbreak pressure and hospital demand.
descriptions.activateIcuSurgeProtocol: ICU occupancy is at a critical level; activate the surge protocol to preserve critical care availability.
descriptions.reviewLocalEpidemiologyResponse: Review hospital readiness for local epidemiological activity in the catchment area.
descriptions.implementRespiratoryIsolation: Establish respiratory isolation zones to reduce in-hospital transmission during the active outbreak.
descriptions.replenishCriticalRespiratorySupplies: Replenish critical protective and respiratory response supplies to maintain staff safety and continuous care.
descriptions.reviewPpeStockLevels: Review PPE inventory and prepare preventive replenishment ahead of increased consumption.

impacts.reducePatientWaitTimes: Reduce patient wait times and prevent diversion
impacts.improvePatientThroughput: Improve patient throughput during outbreak surge
impacts.preventIcuOverflow: Prevent ICU overflow and ensure critical care availability
impacts.reduceRespiratoryTransmission: Reduce risk of respiratory transmission to staff and patients within the hospital
impacts.ensureStaffProtection: Ensure uninterrupted staff protection and maintain readiness for respiratory surge
impacts.avoidPpeStockout: Avoid PPE stockout during active outbreak period

list.openMonitoredBeds: Open additional monitored beds to prevent capacity overflow.
list.reconfirmDischargeReadiness: Reconfirm discharge readiness for stable patients
list.assignDedicatedStaffFlow: Assign dedicated staff flow for suspected respiratory cases
list.reviewPpeBurnRate: Review PPE burn rate before next shift
